title: Env Var Management Hardening — Registry Completeness, Reconciliation, and Guided Setup

tasks.title: Spike: confirm env-registry-types.ts needs no new fields
tasks.description: Review packages/config/src/env-registry-types.ts against the wizard's needs (US-5). Confirm howToObtain/helpUrl already cover the secret-hint requirement (verified in spec) and that no other field is missing before Phase 2 work depends on the shape. If a gap IS found, add the field here first. Test: none required if no change is made; if a field is added, extend the existing packages/config type tests to cover it.

subtasks.title: Review EnvVarDefinition against US-5 acceptance criteria

tasks.title: Register the 3 known-missing env vars in the registry
tasks.description: Add HOSPEDA_TAG_USER_QUOTA_PER_USER (packages/service-core/src/services/tag/tag.service.ts:241), HOSPEDA_DEPLOY_ENV (packages/media/src/server/environment.ts:43), HOSPEDA_QZPAY_TEST_CONTROL_ENABLED (packages/billing/src/adapters/qzpay-test-control.ts:77) to packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts with full metadata (description, type, apps, category, secret if applicable). Test: pnpm env:check:registry still passes (no schema drift introduced); regenerate .env.example via pnpm gen:env-examples and confirm the 3 vars appear.

subtasks.title: Run pnpm gen:env-examples and commit regenerated .env.example files

tasks.title: Extract apps/api/src/utils/env-schema.ts (pure base schema)
tasks.description: Move ApiEnvBaseSchema (plain z.object, currently inline in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts) into a new file apps/api/src/utils/env-schema.ts with ZERO non-zod imports (no dotenv, no logger). Update env.ts to re-export it and keep the dotenv/validator wiring. Test: apps/api typecheck passes; apps/api/test/utils/env-registry-cross-validation.test.ts still passes unchanged (imports ApiEnvBaseSchema from the new location).

subtasks.title: Create env-schema.ts with the extracted z.object
Update env.ts to re-export from env-schema.ts
Update the cross-validation test's import path

tasks.title: Extract apps/admin/src/env-schema.ts (pure base schema)
tasks.description: Extract the z.object({...}) currently in apps/admin/src/env.ts into a new apps/admin/src/env-schema.ts, WITHOUT the adminLogger import from '@/utils/logger' (confirmed this session: that Vite-only path alias does not resolve outside admin's own Vite/tsconfig context). Update env.ts to re-export it, moving any logger-dependent logic to stay in env.ts. Test: apps/admin typecheck passes; apps/admin/test/env-registry-cross-validation.test.ts still passes unchanged.

subtasks.title: Create env-schema.ts with the extracted z.object, no adminLogger import
Update env.ts to re-export and keep logger-dependent code local
Update the cross-validation test's import path

tasks.title: Extract apps/mobile/src/lib/env-schema.ts (pure base schema)
tasks.description: Extract EnvSchema currently in apps/mobile/src/lib/env.ts into apps/mobile/src/lib/env-schema.ts, WITHOUT the 'expo-constants' import (confirmed this session: unsafe to import under plain Node/tsx). Update env.ts to re-export it, keeping Constants-dependent logic local. Test: apps/mobile typecheck passes; existing mobile env tests still pass unchanged.

subtasks.title: Create env-schema.ts with the extracted EnvSchema, no expo-constants import
Update env.ts to re-export and keep Constants-dependent code local

tasks.title: Add apps/web/src/env-schema.ts re-export for naming consistency
tasks.description: apps/web/src/env.ts's serverEnvBaseSchema is already import-clean (zero non-zod imports, confirmed this session). Add apps/web/src/env-schema.ts that re-exports it, purely for naming consistency with the other 3 apps so the JSON generator (T-011) can import a uniformly-named file per app. Test: apps/web typecheck passes; apps/web/test/lib/env-registry-cross-validation.test.ts still passes.

tasks.title: Build pnpm env:check:usage (source-usage-vs-registry scanner)
tasks.description: Write scripts/check-env-usage.ts: regex-scan process.env.X across apps/**/src + packages/**/src (excluding test/dist/docs/scripts subpaths), build the used-keys set, diff against ENV_REGISTRY both directions (used-not-registered = fail with file:line; registered-not-used = informational phantom warning). Wire pnpm env:check:usage in package.json. Test: unit test with a fixture directory containing both a registered and an unregistered process.env.X usage, assert correct classification of each.

subtasks.title: Implement the source scanner (regex over apps/+packages/, exclusions)
Implement the two-way diff against ENV_REGISTRY

tasks.title: Build pnpm env:check:local (.env.local vs registry diff)
tasks.description: Write scripts/check-env-local.ts: parse each app's .env.local (dotenv-style), diff against ENV_REGISTRY filtered by apps.includes(appId), honoring requiredScope ('always' must be present; 'production' NOT required locally; 'conditional' required only when requiredWhen's condition is met in that same .env.local). Wire pnpm env:check:local. Test: 5 fixture cases per US-2's acceptance criteria (present-and-required=pass, missing-and-always-required=fail, missing-and-production-scoped=pass, missing-and-conditional-met=fail, missing-and-conditional-unmet=pass).

tasks.title: Author packages/config/src/env-cross-checks.ts with the seeded REVALIDATION_SECRET rule
tasks.description: Create the CrossCheckRule type + array: { id, description, appliesTo: ('local'|'coolify')[], comparator: 'equals', compare: {app,key}[] }. Seed the first rule: HOSPEDA_REVALIDATION_SECRET must match between api and web, appliesTo: ['local','coolify']. Test: type-level test/compile check that the shape matches; no runtime test needed here (evaluation logic is T-010).

tasks.title: Build pnpm env:check:rules (three-state rule evaluator, local values)
tasks.description: Write scripts/check-env-rules.ts: for each rule in env-cross-checks.ts with appliesTo including 'local', read the named .env.local values, evaluate to 'pass' (equal)/'fail' (both set, different)/'partial' (one side unset — non-failing everywhere). Wire pnpm env:check:rules. Test: 3 fixture cases (both-set-equal→pass, both-set-different→fail, one-unset→partial with exit 0).

subtasks.title: Implement local .env.local value resolution per rule's compare[]

tasks.title: Build scripts/generate-env-registry-json.ts + committed JSON artifact
tasks.description: New sibling script (NOT folded into generate-env-examples.ts's main()) that imports ENV_REGISTRY, the 4 *-env-schema.ts files (T-003..T-006), and env-cross-checks.ts (T-009), introspects simple Zod shapes (ZodEnum.options, ZodBoolean, ZodNumber min/max via _def.checks) into a constraints map keyed 'app:KEY', and writes packages/config/generated/env-registry.json ({registry, crossChecks, constraints}). Skip docker/seed pseudo-AppIds explicitly (mirror EXAMPLE_PATHS' null mapping). Wire pnpm gen:env-registry-json. Test: run twice in a row, assert byte-identical output (determinism).

subtasks.title: Assemble and write the JSON artifact
Write the determinism test (run twice, diff)

tasks.title: Write the env-registry-json guard test
tasks.description: Create packages/config/src/__tests__/env-registry-json.guard.test.ts, re-implementing the JSON-building logic inline (mirroring env-examples.guard.test.ts's exact convention — do NOT import the generator script). Assert committed packages/config/generated/env-registry.json has zero drift vs freshly generated. Also assert the 4 *-env-schema.ts files have zero non-zod imports (simple source-text check) so a future accidental re-import fails loudly. Test: this task IS the test — verify it fails on intentional drift and on an intentionally-reintroduced non-zod import in a throwaway local check before finalizing.

subtasks.title: Re-implement JSON-building logic inline in the test
Add the zero-non-zod-import assertion for the 4 schema files

tasks.title: Wire pnpm env:doctor umbrella script
tasks.description: Add the env:doctor script to package.json running env:check:usage + env:check:local + env:check:rules in sequence, aggregating exit codes (non-zero if any sub-check fails). Test: integration-style test (or a small script test) confirming aggregate exit code reflects the worst sub-check result.

tasks.title: Extract scripts/server-tools/src/lib/repo-root.ts
tasks.description: Extract the --repo / HOPS_REPO_ROOT / ~/hospeda resolution logic currently inlined in scripts/server-tools/src/commands/update.ts into a shared lib/repo-root.ts, and update update.ts to use it. Test: bun test covering the resolution precedence (--repo flag wins, then HOPS_REPO_ROOT env var, then ~/hospeda default).

subtasks.title: Create lib/repo-root.ts with the extracted resolution logic
Update update.ts to use the shared helper

tasks.title: Add hops env-reconcile command
tasks.description: New scripts/server-tools/src/commands/env-reconcile.ts: <api|web|admin> positional + --target=<prod|staging> (explicit-required policy). Reads packages/config/generated/env-registry.json via repo-root.ts (T-014), fetches live Coolify env vars via existing coolify.ts client + container-lookup.ts (findContainer/getApplicationUuid), diffs registry (filtered by apps + requiredScope for that target) vs actual, reports missing-required and orphan-in-coolify. Register in scripts/server-tools/src/index.ts's COMMANDS array. Test: unit test with a mocked coolify.ts client covering missing-required and orphan cases.

tasks.title: Add hops env-check-rules command
tasks.description: New scripts/server-tools/src/commands/env-check-rules.ts: --target=<prod|staging> [--app=<api|web|admin>] — NO mandatory app positional (a rule can span 2 apps). --app only filters which rules run, a selected rule still fetches every app its compare[] names. Evaluate rules with appliesTo including 'coolify' via the same three-state logic as T-010 (reused via the JSON bridge). MUST catch per-rule container-resolution failures (findContainer throws synchronously) and report 'skipped: container unreachable' for that rule only, without aborting the run. Memoize (app,target)→applicationUuid within one run. Register in index.ts. Test: unit tests covering skip-on-unreachable-container and memoization (assert findContainer called once per unique app+target across multiple rules).

subtasks.title: Reuse/port the three-state rule evaluator against live Coolify values

tasks.title: Add hops env-doctor command (VPS umbrella)
tasks.description: New scripts/server-tools/src/commands/env-doctor.ts: <api|web|admin> --target=<prod|staging>, runs env-reconcile + env-check-rules (filtered to the given app) and aggregates results. Register in index.ts. Test: integration-style test confirming aggregate result reflects both sub-commands.

tasks.title: Build the local interactive wizard (pnpm env:set)
tasks.description: Write scripts/env-set-wizard.ts using @clack/prompts. Default mode: only prompt for gaps flagged by env:check:local (T-008) (missing-and-required, missing-and-optional) — never all ~224 entries. --review-all: walk every registry entry for the target app(s), keep/change, redacting secret current values. For type:'enum' entries use the introspected enumValues (from T-011's constraints map) as a select; for boolean/numeric-with-bounds entries, constrain the prompt accordingly. Show howToObtain/helpUrl before prompting for secret entries. Wire pnpm env:set. Test: unit test the gap-detection-to-prompt-list logic and constraint-based prompt selection (enum→select, boolean→y/n, numeric→validated range) without driving the actual interactive prompt (inject a fake prompt adapter).

subtasks.title: Implement gaps-only default mode sourced from env:check:local
Write unit tests with an injectable fake prompt adapter

tasks.title: Extend hops env-set with --wizard/--review-all (VPS variant)
tasks.description: Extend the existing scripts/server-tools/src/commands/env-set.ts with --wizard and --review-all flags, reusing the same gaps-only-by-default UX as T-018 but sourced from env-reconcile's (T-015) output and writing via the existing client.updateEnvVar/createEnvVar. Test: unit tests mirroring T-018's (gap detection, constraint-based prompts) adapted for the Coolify-backed data source.

subtasks.title: Source gaps from env-reconcile's diff logic
Reuse constraint-based prompt selection from T-018
Write unit tests for the VPS wizard variant

tasks.title: Regression test: env:check:usage red-then-green on the 3 known-missing vars
tasks.description: Before T-002's registration lands (or via a git-stash/checkout trick in the test), confirm pnpm env:check:usage flags HOSPEDA_TAG_USER_QUOTA_PER_USER, HOSPEDA_DEPLOY_ENV, HOSPEDA_QZPAY_TEST_CONTROL_ENABLED as used-but-unregistered; after T-002, confirm it's clean. This is the concrete regression test for the bug that motivated this spec — document the before/after explicitly in the test or its description.

tasks.title: Full test/typecheck pass — packages/config
tasks.description: Run pnpm --filter @repo/config test and pnpm --filter @repo/config typecheck after T-009/T-010/T-011/T-012 land. Fix any fallout. Confirms env-cross-checks.ts, the generator, and the guard test are all green together, not just individually.

subtasks.title: Run and fix packages/config test suite

tasks.title: Full test/typecheck pass — scripts/server-tools
tasks.description: Run the server-tools test suite (bun test, if present) and typecheck after T-015/T-016/T-017/T-018/T-019 land. Fix any fallout. Confirms all new hops commands work together (shared repo-root.ts, shared coolify client mocks).

subtasks.title: Run and fix scripts/server-tools test suite

tasks.title: Full test/typecheck pass — 4 apps post schema-extraction
tasks.description: Run typecheck + the env-registry-cross-validation test for apps/api, apps/web, apps/admin, apps/mobile after T-003/T-004/T-005/T-006 land, confirming the *-env-schema.ts extraction didn't break anything (imports still resolve, .shape still enumerable, existing cross-validation tests still pass).

subtasks.title: Run and fix apps/api typecheck + cross-validation test
Run and fix apps/admin typecheck + cross-validation test
Run and fix apps/mobile typecheck + relevant tests

tasks.title: Wire env:check:usage into CI guards job
tasks.description: Add a new step to .github/workflows/ci.yml's guards job, right after the existing env-check steps (~line 227-230), following the identical '- name: ... (HOS-79)\n  run: pnpm <script>' convention: '- name: Env usage vs registry (HOS-79)\n  run: pnpm env:check:usage'. Do NOT wire env:check:local/env:check:rules into CI (no real .env.local there). Test: push and confirm the new CI step runs and passes on a clean branch.

subtasks.title: Add the CI step to the guards job
Verify the step runs green in a CI run

tasks.title: Update docs/guides/env-management.md
tasks.description: Replace the manual 'Audit checklist' section with references to the new automated commands (env:doctor locally, hops env-doctor on the VPS). Note that the Sentry-environment-tagging manual check (currently a documented manual recipe) is now covered by a hops env-check-rules rule IF that rule was added to env-cross-checks.ts within this spec's scope — otherwise flag it explicitly as an immediate follow-up item in the doc.

Update the Sentry-tagging section (covered-by-rule note or follow-up flag)
